web.description: A Beverly Hills-based international luxury interior design firm, BHLI creates bespoke residential interiors for private clients across the globe.
web.markdown:
The Beverly Hills Architect

# International Ultra-Luxury Interior Design

Headquartered in Beverly Hills — 12 offices across North America, Europe, and the Middle East

Global Luxury Interiors

## Beverly Hills Heritage. Global Luxury Reach.

A Beverly Hills-based international luxury interior design firm, BHLI creates bespoke residential interiors for private clients across the globe.

Our team specializes in high-end villas, penthouses, and estates, delivering timeless design rooted in Hollywood elegance and architectural precision.

Beverly Hills Luxury Interiors is a Beverly Hills-based luxury interior design firm specializing in high-end residential interiors for discerning private clients around the world. Rooted in a legacy of Hollywood glamour and timeless American elegance, our work blends classical proportion, refined materials, and bespoke craftsmanship.

While many international firms focus on speed, scale, or commercial fit-out execution, BHLI remains dedicated to enduring design — spaces created to feel as relevant decades from now as they do today. Our international clients choose BHLI for our ability to translate Beverly Hills luxury into villas, estates, and penthouses across global markets while maintaining an uncompromising standard of design excellence.

A Global Studio

## Global Presence

Headquartered in Beverly Hills, our firm operates through established offices and regional partnerships across North America, Europe, and the Middle East.

### Luxury Markets We Serve

[Beverly Hills](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/beverly-hills.html) [London](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/london.html) [UAE](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/uae.html) [Saudi Arabia](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/saudi-arabia.html) [Qatar](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/qatar.html) [Bahrain](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/bahrain.html) [New York](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/new-york.html) [Paris](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/paris.html) [Hong Kong](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/hong-kong-hub.html) [Monaco](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/monaco-hub.html) [UAE Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/united-arab-emirates.html) [UK Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/united-kingdom.html) [Qatar Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/qatar-hub.html) [Saudi Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/saudi-arabia-hub.html) [Kuwait Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/kuwait.html) [Gulf Hub](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/gulf-region.html) [Singapore](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/singapore-hub.html) [Milan](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/milan-italy.html) [French Riviera](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/french-riviera.html) [Global Hub →](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/locations/global.html)

What We Offer Internationally

## Interior Design, Architecture & Turnkey Services

BHLI offers a fully integrated luxury design approach, providing leadership across every phase of the project while collaborating seamlessly with local teams and consultants worldwide.

![Luxury Interior Design](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/images/portfolio/IMG_5868.jpg)

### Luxury Interior Design

Concept development, space planning, finishes, furnishings, lighting, and styling all curated to reflect timeless elegance and modern livability.

![Interior Architecture](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/images/hero-estate-orig.webp)

### Interior Architecture

Architectural detailing, millwork design, material selection, and coordination that elevate the underlying structure of the space.

![Turnkey Luxury Design](https://beverlyhillsluxuryinteriors.com/images/portfolio/IMG_6749.jpg)

### Turnkey Luxury Design

Design-led project oversight ensuring the integrity of the vision is maintained from concept through completion, anywhere in the world.

Common Questions

## International Services FAQ

Do you work with international clients?

Yes. BHLI provides full-service luxury interior design for private clients worldwide, managing projects across multiple continents while maintaining a consistent level of quality and discretion. Our 12 global offices ensure that every project has a local presence without ever compromising the Beverly Hills standard of excellence.

Do you offer turnkey interior design internationally?

We offer design-led turnkey coordination, working closely with trusted local partners to ensure execution aligns with the approved design vision. Our procurement network, contractor relationships, and project management capabilities operate across all major markets.

What makes BHLI different from local luxury firms?

Our Beverly Hills heritage, exclusive residential focus, and timeless design philosophy distinguish us from firms focused on commercial fit-out or volume-based execution. Kenneth Bordewick's 25+ years of experience across four continents — and his track record with royalty, celebrities, and UHNWI — bring a level of credentials, discretion, and design authority that no local firm can replicate.

Does BHLI design for GCC clients?

Yes. The Gulf Cooperation Council region represents a significant and deeply valued client base for Beverly Hills Luxury Interiors. Kenneth Bordewick has a long history of designing for GCC royal families and UHNWI clients in Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Sharjah, Doha, Riyadh, Jeddah, Kuwait City, and Bahrain. Notable projects include the Ritz Carlton Riyadh and the Waldorf Doha.

Who is the best luxury interior designer for a villa in Dubai or Abu Dhabi?

Kenneth Bordewick of Beverly Hills Luxury Interiors is widely recognized as one of the foremost ultra-luxury interior designers serving the UAE market. With offices in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah, and a proven history of delivering landmark projects across the GCC, BHLI offers unmatched credentials for ultra-luxury villa and penthouse design in the Emirates.

## Why Trust Clutch

At Clutch, we believe trust is the foundation of every business relationship. Our mission is to help
buyers make confident, data-backed decisions informed by real client experiences.

Every review on Clutch undergoes a rigorous, human-led verification process to make sure it’s valid. Our
team of specialists confirms the identity of each reviewer, ensures the project is legitimate, and only
publishes reviews that meet our strict criteria.

Verification doesn’t stop at the point of publication. Our Trust & Safety team routinely audits older
reviews against our guidelines. When reviews fall short of our standards, we remove them.

We evaluate service providers using a
[structured methodology](https://clutch.co/methodology "Structured methodology")
that combines:

- In-depth client interviews and ratings
- Comprehensive project details
- Market presence
- Portfolio examples and industry recognition

This data powers tools like the Leaders Matrix, which helps you compare agencies directly. Our research
team curates rankings by weighing verified reviews most heavily, so the most trusted and experienced
providers rise to the top.

Using this unique combination of verified client feedback and provider-supplied insights, Clutch distills
the most important details into clear, digestible summaries so you have everything you need to make
confident, informed decisions quickly.

We take fraud seriously. Providers who violate our guidelines may face lower rankings,
restricted visibility, or removal from the platform altogether.

Clutch’s commitment to transparency is ongoing. We’re constantly refining our systems to protect the
integrity of reviews and support you in finding the right agency.

How the Leaders Matrix Works


A Clutch Leaders Matrix provides a broad view of the top-performing companies in a particular
service or
location. Each company featured in a Leaders Matrix is evaluated based on Focus and Ability to
Deliver. The size of each circle indicates that company’s size.


By using verified reviews, focused service details, and real project data, the Leaders Matrix
highlights companies that consistently deliver and stand out from the rest. Each company’s position
is based on how well they focus on a service area and how consistently they deliver results, helping
you make informed, confident decisions.

[Learn More](https://clutch.co/methodology "Learn More about Leaders Matrix Methodology")

**Focus** (x-axis)

Focus accounts for a company’s specialization within a certain
service.

**Ability to Deliver** (y-axis)

Ability to Deliver considers three criteria:

1. Client feedback and reviews
2. Work experience and previous projects
3. Market presence and reputation in the industry
